prompt: Premium supplement lifestyle product photography on dark matte navy surface. Left of glass: measuring scoop with white protein powder mid-pour cascade. Scattered artfully across dark surface: 2 vanilla pods split open showing rows of dark seeds, 2 vanilla orchid flowers with cream-white petals, small zinc tablets, omega-3 softgels with amber tone, loose collagen peptide powder in small piles. Background: deep dark navy gradient (#070f22) fading to near-black at top. Lighting: warm amber key light upper-left creating golden specular highlights on glass and scattered elements, subtle radial warm glow directly behind glass. 85mm f/3.5 ISO 200. Photorealistic premium supplement brand aesthetic. No product cans, no logos, no text, no people.
